# opnsense_ipsec_key_pair (Resource)

Manages an IPsec key pair on OPNsense, used for public-key authentication. The public and private key PEM payloads are write-only.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) Unique name for the key pair.
- `private_key` (String, Sensitive) PEM-encoded private key. Write-only and sensitive: never read back from the API.
- `public_key` (String) PEM-encoded public key. Write-only: not refreshed from the API.

### Optional

- `key_type` (String) Key type: `rsa` or `ecdsa`. Defaults to `rsa`.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) UUID of the key pair.
- `key_fingerprint` (String) Fingerprint of the key (derived by OPNsense).
- `key_size` (String) Key size in bits (derived from the key).
